deal_killers.objection: No clear, attributable uplift in direct bookings within the agreed pilot window.
Inability to demonstrate a credible, attributable uplift in direct bookings/revenue within the agreed pilot window.
No demonstrated increase in direct bookings or direct room revenue within the agreed pilot window.
If uplift in direct bookings/revenue cannot be measured and credibly attributed within the pilot window.
No demonstrable uplift in direct bookings (revenue/share) or inability to integrate and measure results cleanly within the agreed pilot window.
